name: WebPort Adaptive Preview Engine Transfer Pack
purpose: Portable architecture notes, schemas, rules, and tests for a scrape-to-preview-to-live website engine.

files.description: Audit structure for ensuring scraped content has a rendering destination.
Canonical content object for WebPort scrape outputs and preview rendering.
Rules for mapping scraped content to canonical content and adaptive template slots.
Reusable adaptive layout rules for grids, carousels, image galleries, and responsive previews.
State model for preview sessions and live website publishing.
Unit, integration, and end-to-end test cases for preventing content loss.
Lessons from CatStays and boarding/accommodation preview work.
